CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleInteractionEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
log("시작") local TriggerBodyEntity = event.InteractionEntity local map = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/maps/map01")
--log(map) --log(map.SoundComponent) --log(map.SoundComponent.AudioClipRUID)
map.SoundComponent.AudioClipRUID = "7d681eceb71d44f88a36b32422180d8c" map.SoundComponent:Play()
local mapEntity = _EntityService:GetEntityByPath("/maps/map01/MapObject_8") _CameraService:SwitchCameraTo(mapEntity.CameraComponent) _CameraService.TransitionBlendTime = 3 _CameraService.TransitionBlendType = CameraBlendType.EaseInOut _CameraService:ZoomTo(200, 15)
local returnCamera = function() _CameraService:SwitchCameraTo(TriggerBodyEntity.CameraComponent) _CameraService.TransitionBlendTime = 1.5 _CameraService.TransitionBlendType = CameraBlendType.HardOut _CameraService:ZoomReset()
--효과 바로 재생 --_EffectService:PlayEffectAttached("1dea1763a5fb4c5da2e06411183dbca8", self.Entity, Vector3(0, 1, 0), 0, Vector3(1, 1, 1), false)
--사운드 원래대로 map.SoundComponent.AudioClipRUID = "96caf11b323447fd829582091b364995" map.SoundComponent:Play() end
local startEffect = function() _EffectService:PlayEffectAttached("1dea1763a5fb4c5da2e06411183dbca8", self.Entity, Vector3(0, 1, 0), 0, Vector3(1, 1, 1), false) end _TimerService:SetTimerOnce(returnCamera, 15) _TimerService:SetTimerOnce(startEffect, 18)
